meta.title: Town Stays in Hay-on-Wye | The Book Nook & Hay Glamping | Wye Cabins
meta.description: Stay in the heart of Hay-on-Wye at The Book Nook cabin, or enjoy luxury bell tents at Hay Glamping during the Hay Festival. Hand crafted glamping from Wye Cabins.

headline: Where would you like to stay?

bookNook.title: THE BOOK NOOK
bookNook.alt: The Book Nook cabin in the heart of Hay-on-Wye

hayGlampingIntro: Our luxury pop-up glamping village, just a short stroll from the Hay Festival gates. Spacious bell tents with real beds, crisp linen, continental breakfast and a communal firepit to end the evening. Running since 2014, it's the perfect base for festival-goers who want comfort without compromise.
Open during Hay Festival only (21 May – 1 June 2026). Visit hay-glamping.co.uk for dates and booking.
